title: AI deepfakes blur the line between real and fake, prompting calls for action from Victoria councillor
description: In a world increasingly shaped by artificial intelligence, even a quick reality check can feel necessary.
content:
It’s getting harder to tell what’s real and what isn’t.

title: AI giant Anthropic signs safety pact with Australia
description: The creator of AI chatbot Claude has entered an agreement with Australia to support 'responsible' development of artificial intelligence.
content:
American artificial intelligence giant Anthropic, locked in a months-long dispute with the US government, has signed a pact with Australia to cooperate on safety regarding the controversial technology.

title: Oracle stock hops higher after tech titan launches layoffs of thousands
description: Oracle shares hopped higher on Tuesday after word circulated that the tech titan had begun to notify workers their jobs were being eliminated in what's expected to be a surge of layoffs as the artificial intelligence era evolves.
content:
Oracle shares hopped higher on Tuesday after word circulated that the company had begun to notify workers their jobs were being eliminated in what’s expected to be a surge of layoffs.
The company’s stock soared 6% and closed at $147.11 after the cont... [1348 chars]

title: AI looming large as Indian startups rack up $10 billion in FY26
description: Artificial intelligence-led startups dominated investor interest, while consumer tech, fintech and healthcare continued to attract venture capital flows during the year. Experts said investments in AI would further accelerate over the next year. Data showed that the first quarter of FY26 saw investments of $2.4 billion across startups, which rose to about $2.6 billion each in the next two quarters.

title: Anthropic to sign deal with Australia on AI safety and economic data tracking

title: South Korea and Indonesia Elevate Ties to Strategic Partnership
description: South Korea and Indonesia aim to enhance their relationship to a special comprehensive strategic partnership. Indonesian President Prabowo Subianto's visit to Seoul includes discussions with President Lee Jae Myung to advance trade, investment, defense ties, and cooperation in artificial intelligence, infrastructure, and cultural industries.
content: South Korea and Indonesia are on the brink of upgrading their bilateral relations. This development was announced by Seoul's presidential Blue House on Wednesday, amidst a visit from Indonesian President Prabowo Subianto for a summit with President L... [613 chars]

title: Indian-origin Mangala Kuppa named CIO of US Labour Department
description: HOUSTAN, Mar 31: Indian-origin technology leader Mangala Kuppa has been appointed the Chief Information Officer (CIO) of the US Department of Labour, formalising her role after serving in an acting capacity since October last year. Kuppa, who also serves as the department’s Chief Artificial Intelligence Officer, was appointed earlier this month. She will continue to oversee information technology strategy, digital transformation and AI adoption across the agency. In a LinkedIn post confirming her appointment, Kuppa said she was “grateful for […]
content:
